summary: Critical flaw: actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to full commit SHA (required by best practices). generate-matrix.sh is solid (set -euo pipefail, good error handling, validation). run-act-tests.sh has fragile extraction logic (sed line 140, awk lines 145–165) that depends on exact workflow output format—if delimiter blocks change, multiple parsing points break. CASES array uses unit-separator syntax (explained but not self-documenting). Workflow otherwise well-structured with least-privilege permissions. Would not ship without: (1) pin checkout action, (2) refactor extraction into helper functions, (3) make test case format more maintainable.
